name: Capture
description: Scratch space for ideas, mockups, specs, and todos that emerge from conversation. Nothing here is project code.

folders.captures: Raw ideas, observations, and fragments caught during conversation
folders.specs: Drafted specifications before they move to a domain or project file
folders.todo: Tasks and action items that need to happen but don't have tickets yet
folders.playground: HTML mockups, visual designs, and UI experiments — inline CSS, no JS, isolated from project
folders.assets: Reusable files — icons, fonts, color palettes, shared resources for playground mockups
folders.screenshots: Visual references, UI snapshots, design inspiration
